title: Repository State, References, and Revision Algebra
description: A release repository uses symbolic refs, detached work, replace refs, ambiguous names, and complex revision sets; a maintainer must answer an audit question without moving any ref. Learners cumulatively produce repository-state and revision-query proof through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Distinguish direct refs, symbolic refs, pseudorefs, remote-tracking refs, packed refs, and detached HEAD using plumbing evidence.
Resolve revision names and disambiguate refs, object IDs, paths, reflog selectors, and peel operators before an operation.
Construct inclusive, exclusive, symmetric-difference, ancestry, parent, and path-limited revision sets for an exact question.
